mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.class_name, u.username FROM students s LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (student_no, name, gender, birthday, phone, email, class_id, user_id) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{classId}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, class_id = #{classId}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT gender as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM students GROUP BY gender
SELECT c.class_name as name, COUNT(s.id) as value FROM classes c LEFT JOIN students s ON c.id = s.class_id GROUP BY c.id, c.class_name
